description: Create a scalar data entry. Scalars are an internal list of user-defined objects that have the position v and the value f (assigned via the value keyword) associated with them. Scalars may also have groups and extra variables assigned to them upon creation.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Optionally assign the extra variable a to index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Optionally assign the group name s to slot s2 . By default, s2 = Default . Use of the group logic is described in the topic Group .

keywords.name: value
keywords.description: Assign f to be the value associated with the scalar.
